summary: Phase 10 testing complete. All requested features verified: Admin login flow, Analytics Dashboard with 4 charts, Contact form lead submission, and all 12 API endpoints. Backend refactoring from 1264 lines to modular structure is working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin/admin123 returns token (200)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with token returns user info (200)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/analytics/overview returns totales, empresas_por_categoria, top_empresas, leads_por_mes, vistas_por_categoria
Backend: GET /api/empresas returns list of empresas (3 empresas)
Backend: GET /api/articulos returns list of articulos (3 articulos)
Backend: GET /api/actividades returns list of actividades (10 actividades)
Backend: GET /api/categorias returns categorias list
Backend: POST /api/contacto creates lead successfully
Backend: GET /api/leads requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/leads with token returns leads list
Backend: GET /api/sitemap.xml returns valid XML
Backend: GET /api/nosotros-settings returns mision, vision, valores
Frontend: Admin login page loads at /admin
Frontend: Login with admin/admin123 redirects to /admin/dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows KPI cards (Empresas: 3, Articulos: 3, Actividades: 10, Mensajes: 8, No leidos: 4)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 4 charts (Empresas Más Visitadas, Empresas por Categoría, Mensajes por Mes, Vistas por Categoría)
Frontend: Dashboard quick links are visible and clickable
Frontend: Contact form at /nosotros submits successfully
Frontend: Contact form resets after successful submission
Frontend: Success toast 'Mensaje enviado correctamente' appears
Frontend: Empresas page loads with 3 empresa cards
Frontend: Navigation between pages works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful: server.py reduced from 1264 to ~130 lines with modular routes
Analytics endpoint correctly aggregates data from MongoDB
Auto-seed on startup ensures admin user always exists
All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed leads during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 API endpoints verified working. Admin login and dashboard with analytics charts fully functional. Contact form creates leads correctly. Backend modular refactoring complete and stable. SMTP email is MOCKED (configured but skips due to missing credentials).

mocked_apis.SMTP_email: Configured but not functional - silently skips due to missing SMTP credentials in .env
